title: La sua fede oral history transcript

description: Transcript of a 3.5-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program
Castelnuovo-Tedesco discusses her and her husband's early lives, their emigration from Italy to the U.S., his musical development, musical friends, and performances of his works
